title: Paw Patrol, Chase & Captain Turbot Figure Pack with Baby Octopus Toy Figure, Kids Toys for Boys and Girls Ages 3 and Up
features: Adventures Await: Dive into action with the Chase & Captain Turbot Figure Pack, featuring a 6,3 cm Chase with a movable head and a 10,1 cm Captain Turbot with movable limbs
Imaginative Fun: These PAW Patrol toys look just like they do in the show, sparking creative adventures with authentic design and fan-favorite styling
Adventures Await: Kids will love creating their own heroic tales with these PAW Patrol toys, inspiring bravery and teamwork in every pretend play rescue mission

PAWsome Gifts for Kids: When buying toys for ages 2-4, PAW nursery toys & toddler toys are toys for girls and boys who love toy cars and plushies, as alternatives to dolls, dinosaur toys or a train set
Collect Them All: Expand your collection of PAW Patrol toys for kids with Rescue Wheels toy trucks, PAW Patrol film toys, dragon toys, stuffed animals, toy figures and playsets (each sold separately)
description: Join the PAW Patrol adventure with the Chase & Captain Turbot Figure Pack. This exciting set features a 6,3 cm Chase figure with a movable head and a 10,1 cm Captain Turbot figure with movable limbs, alongside a cute Baby Octopus figure. These figures are crafted with authentic PAW Patrol design and styling, bringing the beloved characters to life just like on the show. With four different story packs to collect, each offering unique characters, the excitement never ends. These PAW Patrol learning toys are PAWsome for a birthday, Christmas, or any holiday. For even more fun, combine with the Fire Rescue Command Center, Rapid Reload Fire Truck and six different Fire Rescue figures and vehicles, so the excitement never ends. (each sold separately) Relive cherished moments from past PAW Patrol seasons, like the Mighty Pups and PAW Patrol Movie, or create new adventures with a PAW Patrol tower, individual PAW Patrol action figures and their PAW Patrol vehicles, for turbo-charged adventures.
